text:
```json
[
  {
    "id": "aws-1",
    "question": "What is your primary goal for learning AWS? (e.g., career advancement, personal project, understanding cloud concepts)",
    "type": "text"
  },
  {
    "id": "aws-2",
    "question": "Which of these AWS services are you already familiar with?",
    "type": "choice",
    "options": [
      "EC2",
      "S3",
      "Lambda",
      "RDS",
      "IAM",
      "None"
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "aws-3",
    "question": "What is your level of experience with cloud computing in general?",
    "type": "choice",
    "options": [
      "Beginner (no prior experience)",
      "Intermediate (some experience with other cloud platforms)",
      "Advanced (extensive experience with other cloud platforms)"
    ]
  }
]
```
